title: Petco Health and Wellness Company, Inc. (WOOF) Stock Price, News, Quote & History - Yahoo Finance
text: Petco Health and Wellness Company, Inc. (WOOF) Stock Overview. Current Quote: Petco trades on the NASDAQ under ticker WOOF. The stock has shown volatility reflecting the company's transformation phase. Stock Performance: 52-week high: $4.51. 52-week low: $2.24. The stock has recovered from lows as market sentiment on the company's profitability improvements has turned more positive. Key News and Updates: Recent earnings announcements have focused on margin expansion, free cash flow generation, and balance sheet improvements. Management commentary emphasizes the Return to positive comp sales expected in 2026. Analyst Coverage: Multiple analyst firms cover WOOF with average price target around $4.06, suggesting 46% upside potential. Consensus rating is Hold, reflecting cautious optimism about the turnaround. Investment Thesis: The company's integrated model combining merchandise retail with high-margin veterinary and grooming services positions it well for long-term growth. Near-term challenges include subdued sales growth and discretionary spending pressures.
